features.title: Improved Performance
features.description: Optimized app performance for smoother navigation and faster load times.

releases.title: The all-new Shusseki v2.0 is here!

features.title: Push Notifications
features.description: Stay updated with real-time push notifications for attendance alerts, feedback responses, and important announcements.

features.title: Academic Calendar
features.description: Integrated academic calendar to keep track of important dates, holidays, and events right within the app.

features.title: Attendance Insights
features.description: Introducing smart attendance insights to help you improve your attendance with personalized recommendations.

features.title: Enhanced Feedback System
features.description: Revamped the feedback prompt system to gather more actionable insights from users.

features.title: Life Skills Attendance
features.description: Added support for tracking Life Skills attendance separately from regular classes.
